description_long: This is a human figure dressed in a full-body, futuristic spacesuit with a sleek, form-fitting design. The suit features reinforced padding on the shoulders, elbows, knees, and boots, as well as a high-tech, seamless helmet with a completely opaque, glossy black visor. The suit is primarily light in color with contrasting dark accents on the joints and extremities, giving it a modern, protective appearance. The gloves and boots are integrated into the suit, suggesting advanced protection and mobility. The overall silhouette is streamlined, with no visible fasteners or external equipment, emphasizing a minimalist, high-performance aesthetic. The figure stands in a neutral, upright pose with arms slightly extended outward.
description: A person in a sleek, full-body futuristic spacesuit with a glossy black helmet visor and reinforced padding at key joints. The suit is streamlined and form-fitting, designed for advanced protection and mobility.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full suit, helmet visor, and reinforced padding on the chest, shoulders, and knees.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the suit's profile, arm and leg contours, and the seamless integration of gloves and boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back padding, suit seams, and the back of the helmet.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the suit's streamlined design and joint protection.
attribute_clothing_type: futuristic full-body spacesuit with integrated helmet and reinforced padding
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly extended
